rationale: Educ. Code §22.101 defines terms for education employee insurance subchapter. Homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative interaction with these definitions.
quote: "Cafeteria plan" means a plan as defined and authorized by Section 125, Internal Revenue Code of 1986.
_note: No conflict. Rule text is a definitions section for education employee benefits; proposed homestead exemption change is unrelated.
